final_text:
The immediate parent of `ModelChoiceField` is `ChoiceField`. The fix is in `to_python` where the `ValidationError` needs to include `params={'value': value}`.

{"file":"django/forms/models.py","class":"ModelChoiceField","method":"to_python","parent_class":"ChoiceField","fix_summary":"The `raise ValidationError(...)` call must pass `params={'value': value}` so that the `%(value)s` placeholder in a custom `invalid_choice` error message is substituted with the actual submitted value."}

parsed_answer.fix_summary: The `raise ValidationError(...)` call must pass `params={'value': value}` so that the `%(value)s` placeholder in a custom `invalid_choice` error message is substituted with the actual submitted value.
